title: One Piece E0001-E0052 MULTi VF2 576p DVDRip x264 10bit -R1 (4:3) (VF, FRENCH, VOSTFR)
description:
### [One Piece](https://anilist.co/anime/21)

J'ai réussi à retrouver des vieux TVRip de la première VF diffusé sur la chaine MANGAS au début des années 2000.
J'ai donc décidé de faire une VF2 pour les 52 premiers épisodes (comme seulement 52 episodes ont été fait sur cette première VF)
Amusez-vous bien !

**Pour plus d'informations :**
C'est une release 4:3, contrairement à toutes les releases licenciés qui sont crop, 
Voici quelques exemples (pris sur l'épisode 1, et pour info c'est le cas pour les 206 premiers épisodes)
https://slow.pics/c/1kPRT0ZO?image-fit=contain


**Source :**
- **Video + Audio JAP** : [[SOFCJ-Raws] One Piece 001-206 (DVDRip 768x576 x264 10bit AC3) ](https://nyaa.si/view/812115) 
(donc non je n'ai pas pris l'affreux upscale de la team [uP], mais libre à vous de vous faire votre propre version avec)
- **VF1 (AB Prod)** : [Batch partagé](https://cache.animetosho.org/nyaasi/view/1375053) sur nyaa par Nandesuka, la plupart des épisodes ont été rip par Typhon78 depuis la chaine MANGAS (j'ai corrigé manuellement l'episode 32 qui était complétement desync)
- **VF2 (TOEI) + sous titres (FORCED)** : `One.Piece.Ep.001-206.MULTi.1080p.WEB.x264-AMB3R` (ADN)
- **Sous-titres FR (FULL)**: (Crunchyroll) Merci à Sora pour le sync (j'ai juste repris ses subs sans rien changer, Peut être qu'il y aura des coquilles de décalages ou autre)

**Les problèmes rencontrés :**
Qualité audio médiocre sur un bon 50% des pistes audios malheureusement

- Episode 47
    - 02:49:019-02:50:918 : Alvida demande à Baggy "Où va-t-on ?" et qui a été corrompu sur le TVRip
    - 10:09:379-10:11:368 : Pareil audio corrompu mais comme uniquement SFX, plus simple à "corriger" (d'où la légère différence audio pour ce passage)
Donc si vous avez un épisode 47 clean n'hésitez pas à me le dire !
- Episode 51
    - 06:46:408-06:47:993 : Zorro qui dit à Luffy que lui aussi mourrait de faim et n'a pas d'argent, mais l'audio a été corrompu
    - 16:25:524-16:26:588 : Le Présentateur présente la grande finale (seulement 200ms de corrompu donc ça reste correct)

**Les libertés que j'ai prise sur la release (sur la VF1 en particulier) :**
- J'ai modifié certaines pistes audio de la VF1 (que ce soit pour rajouter l'introduction ou pour ajouter des endings manquant)
- A savoir que les 52 épisodes contenaient l'ending 1, sauf qu'à partir de l'episode 30 ils changent en VO, ce que j'ai pris la liberté de changer pour la VF1.
- Et pour les épisodes 48-52 l'OP changent, et donc j'ai retiré l'introduction de la VF1 pour mettre l'Opening 2.
- Point aussi important, dans la VF1 les preview des prochains épisodes n'existaient pas et donc j'ai laissé en VO (japonais) pour rester cohérent avec l'annonce du titre qui lui était aussi en japonais (ou sans voix dans la majorité des cas)

Si vous avez des idées sur comment améliorer les pistes audios qui sont à désirer n'hésitez pas à me contacter sur discord :
[`mr_r1`](https://discord.com/users/332556979220381699)

Et si vous avez des retours à faire n'hésitez pas, n'hésitez pas à me DM discord aussi je suis ouvert à la discussion pour m'améliorer ou pour pleins d'autres trucs.
*vf3 coming soon*

description:
**Cowboy Bebop**

![https://i.ibb.co/4wqXrSYS/71-RXk4-Bxl-VL-SL1078.jpg](https://i.ibb.co/4wqXrSYS/71-RXk4-Bxl-VL-SL1078.jpg)

**.: Scheda del filmato :.**
**Titolo originale** Cowboy Bebop
**Titolo Kanji:** カウボーイビバップ
**Anno:** 1998
**Genere:** Avventura, Azione, Fantascienza, Poliziesco
**Episodi:** 26

**.: Trama :.**
Spike Spiegel, un ex-affiliato del Red Dragon, e il suo socio Jet Black, ex-investigatore dell'ISSP, sono due cacciatori di taglie che si spostano di pianeta in pianeta alla ricerca di criminali a bordo della loro astronave: il Bebop. Nel corso delle loro avventure, senza che lo vogliano, ai due si aggiungono tre nuovi compagni: il Welsh Corgi Pembroke iper-intelligente Ein, la provocante truffatrice perseguitata dai creditori Faye Valentine e l'eccentrica e geniale hacker preadolescente Radical Edward. Nel corso delle loro azioni, di solito fallimentari, inconcludenti o di scarso profitto, tutti i membri dell'improbabile equipaggio dovranno fare i conti con questioni ancora irrisolte del loro turbolento passato, segnato da ricordi traumatici, memorie perdute, abbandoni mai chiariti e amori travagliati. Il tutto trattato con una forte nota filosofica, matura, psicologica ed esistenzialista che riflette sia gli attimi migliori che quelli peggiori della vita di cinque individui sperduti.

title: [KanadeBestGirl] Hibike! Euphonium 3 (BDRip 1080p AV1 JPN CHS CHT ENG Aliciä) / 吹响吧！上低音号 第三季 / 吹響吧！上低音號 第三季 / 简繁内封 / Sound! Euphonium 3
description:
![Kanade-chan and Euphonium](https://i.imgur.com/NthI3iS.png)

---

### Subtitle Details

We take the English subtitle from Virtuality's release, which in turn comes from TakaNishi's WebRip release. Thanks to these people for creating the subtitles.
Based on Virtuality's version, we modify OP and ED styling and spacing to make the songs more watchable.

The subtitles in this release have been subset, which means:
If you want to remux this subtitle into your release, make sure you include all the fonts and you're good to go. Despite the number of fonts in this release, it adds up to mere 4 MiB, which is the magic of font subsetting. Thanks to people at AmusementClub that make this possible.
If you want to modify the subtitle upon my version, if you don't mind contacting me, send me a message via [Marshmallow](https://marshmallow-qa.com/s8bbyicls38av1j) or in Discord and I will send you the originals as well as the fonts. Alternatively if you don't want to contact me, open the subtitle in a text editor, and replace the all generated fontname in style and `\fn` with the original fontname following the comments at the very top.

### Filtering and Encoding Details

slow.pics from episode 01: [https://slow.pics/c/IB3PIVKq](https://slow.pics/c/IB3PIVKq).

> *If you don't care about filesize, you can try the original BD instead (6.8 GiB per episode). It has better quality.*  

The source is very based with almost no artefacts. Only in rare occasions, especially when there are scaling involved in the original production, are there some very slight ringing around the lines. There is a layer of added noise atop the image. We decide to denoise it first in the filtering and generate it back during encoding.
To filter, we use `DFTTest` and `vsdenoise.BM3D` to denoise, and then `vsdehao.edge_cleaner` to clean up the remaining noise around the lines as well as the very occasional ringing.

For encoding, we use Progression Boost Preset-Butteraugli-3Norm-INFNorm-Max to deliver a rather high quality encode. This is the metric of episode 01 without film grain compared to the filtered source:
| Metric | Mean | Standard Deviation | 95th or 5th Percentile | Worst Single Frame |
| :-- | :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: |
| **Butteraugli** 3Norm | **0.438** | 0.052 | 0.509 | 0.632 |
| **Butteraugli** INFNorm | **1.607** | 0.436 | 2.449 | 7.778 |
| **SSIMU2** | **89.859** | 1.413 | 87.664 | 83.965 |

We use svt-av1-psyex testing branch for the encode, and these are the encoding parameters: `--preset [-1 ~ 0] --crf [7.75 ~ 25.00] --tune 0 --qm-min 8 --chroma-qm-min 10 --luminance-qp-bias 8 --qp-scale-compress-strength 3 --noise-norm-strength 4 --film-grain 0 --complex-hvs 1 --psy-rd 3.5 --spy-rd 0`.
After svt-av1-psyex, we use av1an's `--photon-noise 9` to generate a similar level of noise compared to the source.

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me and giving me advice.

You are welcome to join AV1 weeb edition at [https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7).

### Media Info

For episode 05, 08, 11, 12, and 13:
| Track | Language | Source | Codec | Remark |
| :-- | :-- | :-- | :-- | :-- |
| **Video** | Japanese | JPBD from 02@U2 | AV1 | Filtered and Reencoded |
| **Audio** | Japanese | JPBD from 02@U2 | FLAC | Reencoded |
| **Subtitle** | Japanese | JPBD from 02@U2 | PGS | Untouched |
| **Subtitle** | Chinese (Simplified) & Japanese | 北宇治字幕组 | ASS | Timing shifted to match JPBD by Nazuna@bbs.acgrip[]().com |
| **Subtitle** | Chinese (Traditional) & Japanese | 北宇治字幕組 | 〃 | Timing shifted to match JPBD by Nazuna@bbs.acgrip[]().com |
| **Subtitle** | English | KanadeBestGirl / Virtuality / TakaNishi | 〃 | Improved OP and ED styling and spacing |

For episode 01, 02, 03, 04, 06, 07, 09, and 10:
| Track | Language | Source | Codec | Remark |
| :-- | :-- | :-- | :-- | :-- |
| **Video** | Japanese | JPBD from 02@U2 | AV1 | Filtered and Reencoded |
| **Audio** | Japanese | JPBD from 02@U2 | Opus | Reencoded |

| **Subtitle** | English | KanadeBestGirl / Virtuality / TakaNishi | 〃 | Improved OP and ED styling and spacing |

For extra episodes:

テレビ朝日
6月14日 土曜 20:00 -20:54  
毎日見ているニュース、アナタはどのくらい理解していますか？「不起訴って？」「外免切り替えって？」深掘りすると実はよくわからないニュースのこと、池上彰が解説します

	不起訴になった、とニュースで聞くけど、無罪と何が違う？示談になったら無罪？内閣支持率は誰が何のために調べてる？…ニュースでよく聞くけど意外と知らないその意味を池上彰が解説します！意味がわかるとニュースがもっと面白くなる！

title: 新プロジェクトＸ　ドクターヘリ赤ちゃんの砦を守れ　熊本地震１８時間の救出劇
description:
新プロジェクトＸ　ドクターヘリ赤ちゃんの砦を守れ　熊本地震１８時間の救出劇
[総合] 
2025年06月14日 午後8:00 〜 午後8:50 (50分)
熊本地震で市民病院が倒壊の危機！そのとき、赤ちゃんを救うべく駆けつけた鹿児島ドクターヘリ。命を平等に助けたいと、全身全霊を賭けた医師とパイロットたちの物語。

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/4lMv4Br.png "新プロジェクトＸ　ドクターヘリ赤ちゃんの砦を守れ　熊本地震１８時間の救出劇")

	熊本地震で市民病院が倒壊の危機！そのとき、赤ちゃんを救うべく、県境を越えて駆けつけた鹿児島ドクターヘリ。自力で呼吸が出来ない赤ちゃんを救った裏には、医療の格差と戦ってきた苦難の歴史があった。都会なら助かる命が、地方では助けられない。命の平等をめざして奮闘してきた医師、難病を乗り越え恩返しを誓った若手医師、パイロット、整備士。５年間磨き上げた特殊仕様のヘリによる、熊本地震１８時間の救出劇。

description:
ブラタモリ　東京・青山通り▼江戸の街道がルーツ？皇居から赤坂へ！大名屋敷
[総合] 
2025年06月14日 午後7:30 〜 午後8:00 (30分)
今回の舞台は青山通り▼赤坂・青山・表参道と東京の一等地をつなぐ道のルーツは江戸の街道にあり？江戸城・赤坂御門の秘密＆巨大な大名屋敷門を発見！タモリ大興奮の急坂

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/4SgnGaC.png "ブラタモリ　東京・青山通り▼江戸の街道がルーツ？皇居から赤坂へ！大名屋敷")

	今回の舞台は東京・青山通り。赤坂・青山・表参道と東京の一等地をつなぐ「青山通り」はなぜステキなのか？その秘密を江戸時代の痕跡から探る！皇居のすぐそばにある三宅坂をスタートすると、いきなり江戸時代の石垣を発見！赤坂御門を起点とした江戸時代の道「大山街道」が、青山通りのルーツだった！？牛も鳴くといわれた江戸の急坂。上がると突如現れる巨大な大名屋敷門にタモリ大興奮！広くてまっすぐな道は路面電車の痕跡！？

description:
![img](https://i.imgur.com/f27fSt2.png)

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide
 
Vol.2はMangaroo提供、メタデータ付きです。
EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア   

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

---

## 📬 お問い合わせ / Contact

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

title: Lost.In.Starlight.(Yi.Byeole.Pilyohan).2025.2160p.NF.WEB-DL.VOSTFR.{MULTI.SUBS}.E-AC3.5.1.Atmos.10bit.HDR.x265-TBMovies
description:
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/SDwL1Lm5/Lost-in-Starlight-766457195-large.jpg.jpg "Logo Title Text 1")

___

# Lost In Starlight




***

SUBS : KOR (full, forced, sdh), FR (full, sdh), US, GER, SPA, ITA, JAP, POR, CH





___

L’intrigue suit Nan-young, une astronaute brillante déterminée à rejoindre Mars, et Jay, un ancien musicien dont les rêves se sont effondrés. 
Leur rencontre, déclenchée par la réparation d’une vieille platine vinyle, ouvre une parenthèse hors du temps dans une Séoul de 2050 à l’esthétique rétro-futuriste, entre néons, hologrammes et objets d’un passé réconfortant. 
Tandis que Nan-young tente de surmonter l’échec d’une sélection spatiale, Jay s'accroche à ses souvenirs à travers les sons et les silences. 
Ensemble, ils se réparent peu à peu, apprivoisant l'autre au fil de conversations discrètes, de musiques partagées et de regards suspendus. 
Mais lorsque le rêve de Nan-young renaît, leur lien naissant est mis à l’épreuve par l’immensité d’un voyage interplanétaire — et la question de ce qu’il en reste, lorsque l’amour devient une absence habitée.


___



Netflix propose son tout premier film d’animation coréen.
Réalisé par Han Ji-won, ce projet mêle science-fiction et mélancolie amoureuse dans une version futuriste de Séoul, portée par les voix de Kim Tae-ri et Hong Kyung.

Avec Lost in Starlight, Netflix propose bien plus qu’un film d’animation. 
C’est une plongée sensible dans un monde où la technologie et les émotions s’entremêlent, où chaque image porte l’écho d’une solitude ou d’un espoir.

Juste l’Espace Entre Nous raconte une romance délicate entre deux âmes cabossées, dans une Séoul rétro-futuriste, entre vinyles et voyages spatiaux. 
Nourri d’influences comme Voices of a Distant Star, le film mêle douceur quotidienne et aspirations brisées, ravivées par une rencontre inattendue. 
Loin des clichés, il explore la distance, le deuil des rêves et l’amour comme lien fragile mais tenace. 
Sa beauté visuelle et émotionnelle touche en plein cœur, malgré une sortie passée inaperçue.
___


Mediainfo : https://textup.fr/850442tD




___

Origine : Œuvre originale

Simulcast / streaming : Netflix


___


The plot follows Nan-young, a brilliant astronaut determined to reach Mars, and Jay, a former musician whose dreams have collapsed.
Their meeting, triggered by the repair of an old vinyl turntable, opens a timeless parenthesis in a Seoul of 2050, with its retro-futuristic aesthetic of neon lights, holograms and objects from a comforting past.
While Nan-young tries to overcome the failure of a space selection, Jay clings to his memories through sounds and silences.
Together, they gradually repair, taming each other through discreet conversations, shared music and suspended glances.
But when Nan-young's dream is reborn, their budding bond is tested by the immensity of interplanetary travel - and the question of what remains, when love becomes a lived-in absence.

Netflix offers its very first Korean animated film.
Directed by Han Ji-won, this project blends science fiction and melancholy love in a futuristic version of Seoul, carried by the voices of Kim Tae-ri and Hong Kyung.

With Lost in Starlight, Netflix offers much more than an animated film.
It's a sensitive plunge into a world where technology and emotions intertwine, where every image carries the echo of solitude or hope.

___

Just the Space Between Us tells the story of a delicate romance between two damaged souls, set in retro-futuristic Seoul, between vinyl and space travel.
Nourished by influences such as Voices of a Distant Star, the film blends everyday sweetness with broken aspirations, rekindled by an unexpected encounter.
Far from clichés, it explores distance, the mourning of dreams and love as a fragile but tenacious bond.
Its visual and emotional beauty touches the heart, despite a release that went unnoticed.

# School Days



***

L'histoire commence dans un lycée ou Makoto Ito est tombé amoureux d'une fille Kotonoha Katsura. 
Il la voit tous les jours dans le même train qu'ils prennent pour aller au lycée. 
Sekai Saionji une amie qui est dans la même classe que Makoto lui propose de l'aider, malgré ses sentiments pour lui...


___

School Days choque par son contraste brutal entre un début de romance lycéenne classique et une descente psychologique violente. 
Si l'animation est correcte sans être mémorable, c’est surtout son scénario imprévisible et dérangeant qui divise : audacieux pour certains, malsain et gratuit pour d'autres.

**Описание:**
Зенос родился в трущобах и не имел никаких перспектив, пока не встретился с целителем. Встреча произвела на юношу такое впечатление, что он посвятил всего себя учёбе, в надежде тоже освоить это ремесло. Впервые Зеносу выпадает шанс, когда искатели приключений приглашают его в своей отряд. Он был так счастлив, что не обращал внимание на мелочи, вроде хренового отношения со стороны сопартийцев и отказа признавать его заслуги и полезность. Увы, через некоторое время это выливается в позорное изгнание из отряда. Зенос снова оказывается на дне жизни, но решает использовать свои с таким трудом приобретённые навыки иным способом: он открывает подпольную клинику и внезапно становится невероятно успешным. Слухи о превосходном целителе, творящем чудеса в городском подполье достигают даже королевского дворца…

**Качество видео:** WEBRip (CR)
**Формат:** mkv
**Видео кодек:** x264
**Аудио кодек:** AAC
**Видео:** AVC (High@L4), 1920x1080 (16:9), ~23.976 fps, ~8 Mb/s
**Аудио 1:** AAC, 48.0 KHz, 196 kbps, 2 ch (Русский, Dream Cast)
**Аудио 2:** AAC, 48.0 KHz, 196 kbps, 2 ch (Русский, AniLibria.TV)
**Аудио 3:** AAC, 44.1 KHz, 128 kbps, 2 ch (Японский, Makaria)

Undead Unluck (アンデッドアンラック, Andeddo Anrakku) is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Yoshifumi Tozuka.

What happens when an unlucky girl meets an undead guy? Pure chaos!
Tired of inadvertently killing people with her special ability Unluck, Fuuko Izumo sets out to end it all. But when she meets Andy, a man who longs for death but can’t die, she finds a reason to live—and he finds someone capable of giving him the death he’s been longing for.

### Plot Summary: 
Dreams are doomed to die in Night City, a futuristic Californian metropolis. As a teenager living in the city's slums, David Martinez is trying to fulfill his mother's lifelong wish for him to reach the top of Arasaka, the world's leading security corporation. To this end, he attends the prestigious Arasaka Academy while his mother works tirelessly to keep their family afloat.
When an incident with a street gang leaves David's life in tatters, he stumbles upon Sandevistan cyberware—a prosthetic that grants its wearer superhuman speed. Fueled by rage, David implants the device in his back, using it to exact revenge on one of his tormentors. This gets him expelled from the academy, shattering his hopes of ever making his mother proud.
After witnessing David's newfound abilities, the beautiful data thief Lucyna "Lucy" Kushinada offers to team up with him, handing him a ticket to salvation. However, associating with Lucy introduces David to the world of Edgerunners—cyborg criminals who will break any law for money. Edgerunners often lose their lives, if the cyberware does not break their minds first; but in his fight for survival inside a corrupt system, David is ready to risk it all.

title: [VCB-Studio] 熊熊勇闯异世界 / Kuma Kuma Kuma Bear / くまクマ熊ベアー 10-bit 1080p HEVC BDRip [S1-S2 Fin]
description:
![Kuma-Kuma-Kuma-Bear_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2025/06/13/Kuma-Kuma-Kuma-Bear_800.webp)  
  
熊熊勇闯异世界 / Kuma Kuma Kuma Bear / くまクマ熊ベアー S1 + S2 BDRip  
  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Certain episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
本番由 **组员提名**，应要求制作。感谢他们为 VCB-Studio 发展做出的无私奉献。  
This project was **nominated by our members** and produced upon request. Thanks to them for their selfless dedication to the development of VCB-Studio.  
  
原盘画质挺好，就是糊，原生分辨率 892.4。全片有 EMT Squared 特产的细腻动噪，基本没有色带，就是噪点量太大，导致一小部分动态场景略有欠码。处理方面就是常规手段，不过由于两季度线条锐度有所不同，S1 非常糊，S2 提升了一些但还是糊，因此我们使用了不同的逆向拉升重构算法，并且辅以不同强度的补偿性锐化，以保证观感。  
The source has good visual quality, but it's blurry, with a native resolution of 892.4. The entire show features fine dynamic noise, a characteristic of EMT Squared. There is almost no banding, but the amount of noise is so significant that it leads to a slight lack of bitrate in a few dynamic scenes. For pre-processing, we used conventional methods. However, since the line sharpness differs between the two seasons—S1 is very blurry, while S2 has improved but remains blurry—we utilized different descaling and reconstruction algorithms, supplemented with compensatory sharpening of varying strengths to ensure the viewing experience.  
  

* * *

感谢所有参与制作者 / Thanks to our participating members:  
总监 / Script: 优奈  
压制 / Encode: 菲娜  
整理 / Collate: 修莉  
发布 / Upload: 堤露米娜  
分流 / Seed: VCB-Studio CDN 分流成员  
  
感谢所有资源提供者 / Thanks to all resource providers:  
CDs: TheM14@HAYAKU, zolveasia@JPopsuki  
  

* * *

VCB-Studio 已不再保证收集作品相关 CD 和扫图资源，详情请参见 [https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331](https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331)。  
Please refer to [https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331](https://vcb-s.com/archives/14331) for more information about that VCB-Studio will no longer guarantee to include relevant CDs and scans.  
  
本组（不）定期招募新成员。详情请参见 [https://vcb-s.com/archives/16986](https://vcb-s.com/archives/16986)。

title: [DB] Tokyo Revengers (Season 1+2+3) (Uncensored) [Dual Audio 10bit BD1080p][HEVC-x265] (Batch) (Tokyo Revengers+Seiya Kessen-hen+Tenjiku-hen)
description:
Tokyo Revengers complete as of June 2025

Synopsis

Takemichi Hanagaki's second year of middle school was the highest point in his life. He had respect, a gang of friends he could count on, and even a girlfriend. But that was twelve years ago. Today, he's a nobody: a washed-up nonentity made fun of by children and always forced to apologize to his younger boss. A sudden news report on the Tokyo Manji Gang's cruel murder of the only girlfriend he ever had alongside her brother only adds insult to injury. Half a second before a train ends his pitiful life for good, Takemichi flashes back to that same day 12 years ago, when he was still dating Hinata Tachibana.

After being forced to relive the very same day that began his downward spiral, Takemichi meets Hinata's younger brother. Without thinking, he admits to his seeming death before flashing back to the past. Takemichi urges him to protect his sister before inexplicably returning to the future. Miraculously, he is not dead. Stranger still, the future has changed. It seems as though Takemichi can alter the flow of time. Given the chance to prevent his ex-girlfriend's tragic death at the hands of the Tokyo Manji Gang, Takemichi decides to fly through time to change the course of the future.

title: [Mocha] From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman (Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru) - 07 [WEB 1080p x265][E-AC-3][DAC8081B].mkv
description:
**Story summary from MAL:**
"Beryl Gardinant, a self-proclaimed "humble old man," is a sword instructor at his dojo in a rural, backwater village. In his younger years, he dreamed of glory as a master swordsman, but those days are long behind him. Out of the blue, he receives a visit from a famous former pupil who brings him world-shattering news—he's been appointed as a special instructor for the knights of the Liberion Order!

"With his life now turned upside down, Beryl travels to the capital and reunites with some of his former students: elite knights, an ace wizard, and even an adventurer who's attained the highest guild rank possible. But why do they all want his tutelage?! As far as he's concerned, they clearly don't need him anymore. Can Beryl live up to his new position? And will he ever get a moment's peace away from his adoring students?!”

----

The source novels are fairly liked in Japan, but the manga adaptation helped to launch the popularity of the franchise with its excellent drawings of sword combat. Hopefully that will eventually be on display in this anime adaptation as well.

Rough plan is to try to release an ep before the next ep airs, probably a day or so before it. Song tl eventually, as soon as official lyrics for the OP drops (which is towards the end of May) … eventual tv/web batch will have it in all eps.

For name and place usage we have been using the English releases of the novels by J-Novel Club.

title: [Kekkan] Kanpekiseijo - 11 (WebRip 1080p AV1 Multi-Subs Aliciä) / Kanpekisugite Kawaige ga Nai to Konyaku Haki sareta Seijo wa Ringoku ni Urareru
description:
We figure we haven't featured Saint Hildegard yet, so here she it.
![Saint Hildegard](https://i.imgur.com/UiKKAy6.png)

---

### Filtering and Encoding Details

slow.pics from episode 01: [https://slow.pics/c/7yAhaDeW](https://slow.pics/c/7yAhaDeW).

The most noticeable artefact throughout this anime is its strong ringing around the lines. We could not find the correct kernel for descaling. For scenes that have smaller descaling error, we use `vsscale.Rescale` and `vsdehalo.edge_cleaner` to filter the frames. For scenes that have larger descaling error, we use `vsdehalo.fine_dehalo` and `vsaa.based_aa` to filter the frames.
There are not many action scenes in this anime, but most of them have terrible-looking encoding artefacts in the source. To hopefully minimise the artefacts, specifically for action scenes, we use DPIR to deblock, followed by `vsdehalo.edge_cleaner` and a stronger gaussian-filtering aa to filter the frames.
This anime is characterised by its heavy film grain. We opt to keep as much grain as possible during the filtering process.

For encoding, we use Progression Boost Preset-Butteraugli-3Norm-INFNorm-Max to deliver a rather high quality encode. This is the Butteraugli 3Norm score of episode 01 with film grain removed compared to the filtered source:
| Metric | Mean | Standard Deviation | 95th Percentile | Worst Single Frame |
| :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: | :--: |
| **Butteraugli 3Norm** | **0.359** | 0.097 | 0.500 | 0.633 |
We use SVT-AV1-PSY v2.3.0-Q, and these are the key encoding parameters: `--preset [-1 ~ 0] --crf [6.25 ~ 30.00] --tune 3 --enable-tf 1 --kf-tf-strength 1 --tf-strength 2 --sharpness 0 --film-grain 7 --psy-rd 2.6 --spy-rd 0`.

Thanks to all the people creating the tools, plugins and vsfunc's that make this possible, and thanks to everyone in the community for teaching me and giving me advice.

You are welcome to join AV1 weeb edition at [https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7](https://discord.gg/83dRFDFDp7).

When Aichi Coexistence Academy converted from all-girls to a coed model, the female students were so concerned about male misbehavior that they armed themselves! Now the school is ruled by the lovely but lethal Supreme Five Swords, and the boys are forced to dress and act like girls or suffer the razor sharp points of the Swords' anger.
Unfortunately for the Swords, new transfer student Fudo Nomura thinks that sounds like a total drag, and he might just have the martial arts chops and rapier wit needed to slash through the Swords' defenses and carve a new niche for himself in their feisty feminine hearts!

title: [Aergia] Ristorante Paradiso (2009) (WEB-DL 1080p AVC AC-3)
description:
### Ristorante Paradiso

| Track          | Details                     |
|----------------|-----------------------------|
| Video          | Netflix WEB-DL              |
| Audio Track    | Japanese 2.0 AC-3           |
| Subtitle Track | Full Subtitles [Right stuf] |

#### Notes:
Combines the best available sources, video is pretty starved but there is nothing better (The Crunchyroll WEB-DL is bad before anyone asks).
Netflix audio sounded awful so R2J DVD audio has been synced instead.
The R1 DVDs had an updated script and signs translated so I synced and recolored them. OCRing and typesetting is more effort than I was willing to do for this.
The WEB-DL had missing colorimetry metadata and the R2J DVD had outright wrong metadata so those have been fixed too.

title: Sfondamento dei cieli Gurren Lagann The Movies [BluRay.Mux.2160p.x265.HDR.ATMOS.JPN.AC3.ITA.JPN.Subs.Ita.Eng] [153.8GB] [stress]
description:
**Sfondamento dei cieli Gurren Lagann The Movies**

![https://i.ibb.co/Q3pkbdbm/image.png](https://i.ibb.co/Q3pkbdbm/image.png)

**.: Scheda del filmato :.**
**Titolo originale:** Gekijouban Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann: Gurren-hen -- Gekijouban Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann - Ragan-hen 
**Titolo Kanji:** 劇場版 天元突破グレンラガン 紅蓮篇 - 劇場版 天元突破グレンラガン 螺巌篇
**Anno:** 2008-2009
**Genere:** Azione, Fantascienza, Mecha 

**.: Trama :.**
Film riassuntivi di "Tengen Toppa: Gurren - Lagann". In un lontanissimo futuro i frequenti terremoti hanno costretto l'umanità a vivere in villaggi sotterranei in continua espansione grazie al lavoro di alcuni scavatori. Tra di loro c'è Simon, un ragazzo che ha perso i genitori in tenera età a causa di un terremoto e che durante uno dei suoi scavi ha trovato uno strano oggetto luminoso a forma di trivella. Qui entra in gioco Kamina, un giovane scapestrato che vive nello stesso villaggio sotterraneo di Simon e che sogna di poter raggiungere la superficie assieme a lui. Un giorno un enorme robot sfonda il soffitto della caverna e inizia a distruggere il villaggio. Kamina decide spavaldamente di affrontare il nemico, armato solo di una katana, ma viene interrotto da una misteriosa ragazza che entra in scena sparando. Si tratta di Yoko, un'abitante del villaggio di Ritona che stava inseguendo il Ganmen, il robot gigante. Qui scoprono che i Ganmen, pilotati dagli uomini-bestia, attaccano costantemente gli esseri umani e sono anche la causa dei terremoti. Mentre difendono Ritona, Kamina riesce ad impadronirsi di uno di questi Ganmen e lo chiama Gurren. Il trio deciderà di partire verso la base nemica per porre fine a queste battaglie.

title: Galaxy Express 999 - 011 à 020 [MULTI][VOSTFR/VF][1080p][SnC-Fansub]
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/ut6Wasb.png "GE999")


# 🚂 Galaxy Express 999 🌌

**Titre original** : 銀河鉄道999 (Ginga Tetsudō 999)  
**Année** : 1978–1981  
**Format** : Série TV - 113 épisodes  
**Studio** : Toei Animation  
**Auteur original** : Leiji Matsumoto  
**Genres** : Space Opera, Aventure, Drame, Philosophie  

**Galaxy Express 999** (_Ginga Tetsudō 999_) est une œuvre majeure de la science-fiction japonaise créée par **Leiji Matsumoto**. Ce manga et anime emblématique lancé en 1977, Galaxy Express 999 explore des thèmes philosophiques profonds, l’humanité, la mortalité, le progrès technologique  à travers un voyage spatial symbolique. Son esthétique rétrofuturiste, sa poésie mélancolique et sa réflexion sur la condition humaine continuent d’inspirer des générations de spectateurs.

---

## 📜 Synopsis

> « Un train intergalactique traverse la Voie lactée, emportant à son bord des âmes en quête d'humanité. »

Dans un futur lointain, les humains peuvent transférer leur conscience dans des corps mécaniques pour accéder à l’immortalité. **Tetsurô Hoshino**, jeune orphelin, rêve de voyager à bord du **Galaxy Express 999** vers la planète Andromeda, où les corps mécaniques sont gratuits. Accompagné de la mystérieuse **Maetel**, il embarque pour un voyage initiatique à travers les étoiles, où il explore des planètes aux sociétés dystopiques et découvre peu à peu la véritable nature de l’humanité, le poids de ses choix et les sombres réalités de l’immortalité.

---

## 📚  Liste des épisodes 🗂️
- Épisode 11 - Noolba la planète informe
- Épisode 12 - Le guerrier des fossiles - partie 1
- Épisode 13 - Le guerrier des fossiles - partie 2
- Épisode 14 - Lalla de la planète double
- Épisode 15 - Beethoven du pays de l'eau
- Épisode 16 - La ville des lucioles
- Épisode 17 - La planète blindée
- Épisode 18 - La Maetel de boue
- Épisode 19 - Le pays de la pénitence
- Épisode 20 - Esprit professionnel
---

**Описание:**
Продолжение истории.
Тринадцать лет назад над Землёй возник гигантский летающий замок, из которого начали раз в неделю появляться разнообразные монстры, пытающиеся захватить мир. И каждый раз их злодейские планы останавливали Хранители-Драконы — пять могучих героев, охраняющих планету от вечной угрозы.
Но что если это всё обман? Что если настоящие завоеватели давно побеждены? А роль монстров играют пусть и бессмертные, но бессильные бойцы-статисты, чтобы поддерживать влияние Хранителей? И что если одному из бойцов это всё в конец осточертело, и он хочет нарушить статус-кво?
